commands.ci_test: mix ecto.create --quiet && mix ecto.migrate --quiet && mix test

test_patterns.flash_assert: assert_flash(view, :error, "message") - use ConnCase helper, not DOM queries
test_patterns.provider_session_setup: insert program with provider_id, then program_session with program_id and date
test_patterns.insert_child: insert_child_with_guardian(parent: parent_schema, first_name: "Alice") - parent must be ecto schema
test_patterns.event_testing: EventTestHelper.setup_test_events() in setup, then TestEventPublisher.get_events() for assertions - safe for async: true (process-local)
test_patterns.bulk_check_in_pattern: participation_record_schema factory creates own session+child internally, overrides with session_id:/child_id: work fine
test_patterns.messaging_helper_tests: MessagingLiveHelper pure functions (get_conversation_title/1, own_message?/2, get_sender_name/2) use ExUnit.Case async: true - no DB needed
test_patterns.participation_live_checkin_fk: check_in_by and check_out_by FK to users table; use current_scope.user.id NOT provider_id; click via element(view, "button[phx-click='check_in'][phx-value-id='#{record.id}']")
test_patterns.pure_domain_service_tests: Pure domain services (no DB) use ExUnit.Case, async: true; construct structs directly or call module functions; no setup needed
test_patterns.behavioral_note_schema_factory: insert(:behavioral_note_schema) auto-creates user+provider+record via FK constraints; override provider_id explicitly when testing cross-provider isolation
test_patterns.parent_profile_use_case: CreateParentProfile needs real user (unconfirmed_user_fixture) for FK; notification_preferences stored as :map type returns string keys from DB (not atom keys) - assert is_map/1 not exact equality
test_patterns.create_parent_profile_identity_fk: identity_id in parent_profiles FK references users table - need real user via unconfirmed_user_fixture(intended_roles: [:parent])
test_patterns.activity_goal_calculator_tests: Pure domain service, async: true, no DB; sessions field accepts list (length counted) or string 'current/total' (Integer.parse on current); percentage capped at 100; statuses: :achieved >=100%, :almost_there >=80%, :in_progress otherwise
test_patterns.enrollment_identity_id_pattern: enrolled?/2 and list_enrolled_identity_ids/1 join enrollments->parent_profiles on parent_id, filter by active_only (pending+confirmed); pass parent.identity_id (user.id) not parent.id to CheckEnrollment.execute/2
test_patterns.staff_member_use_case_tests: staff_member_fixture(provider_id: id) creates a staff member; Provider facade used for create/update/delete/get_staff_member; delete returns :ok or {:error, :not_found}; update ignores provider_id changes (not in @allowed_fields)
test_patterns.integration_event_publishing_tests: IntegrationEventPublishing tests use ExUnit.Case async: true (no DB); call TestIntegrationEventPublisher.setup() in setup; use configure_publish_error(:reason) to simulate failures; tests cover publish_critical (propagates) vs publish_best_effort (swallows)
test_patterns.referral_code_generator_tests: ReferralCodeGenerator.generate/2 splits name on " " parts:2, takes List.first, trims - so 'John Smith' -> 'JOHN'; location passed as-is; year_suffix: 2-digit string auto-derived from Date.utc_today().year rem 100 padded to 2 chars
test_patterns.participant_policy_form_changeset: ParticipantPolicyForm.changeset/1 (no args uses default struct) and changeset/2 (existing struct, attrs); cross-field: min_age > max_age adds error to :min_age_months; min_grade > max_grade adds error to :min_grade; allowed_genders invalid message contains 'invalid values: <val>'
test_patterns.concurrent_enrollment_sandbox: Use Sandbox.allow(Repo, test_pid, self()) inside Task.async_stream tasks when test module uses async: true (exclusive sandbox mode); @tag :capture_log suppresses expected duplicate warning log
test_patterns.reply_privately_broadcast_guards: ReplyPrivatelyToBroadcast: insert(:conversation_schema, type: "direct", ...) for :not_broadcast test; create user without insert(:participant_schema) for :not_participant test; scope built from %Scope{user:, roles: [:parent], parent: %ParentProfile{...}, provider: nil}

backlog.reason: 9 event factory functions, tests would guard payload shape contracts
already thoroughly covered by explicit tests
existing tests verify DB state only; on_item_updated/2 publishes provider_verified/provider_unverified events - complex to test from LiveView
only 2 tests; missing: critical event with no registered handlers, publish_all/1, build_topic/2/derive_topic/1

Commented on issue #397 with Task.async_stream concurrent test strategy. Confirmed PR #401 (ReferralCodeGenerator + ProgramCategories) merged. PR #413 MERGED.

Task 6 review: existing infrastructure (EventTestHelper, DataCase, ConnCase, ProviderFixtures, factory.ex) is comprehensive; UseCaseCase exists but unused. PR #401 MERGED.
